title: Landing page renders core sections on initial load
description: Verifies the public landing page loads and displays the primary marketing sections a user expects to see.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)

title: Hero section shows a primary call-to-action
description: Verifies the hero area presents a prominent CTA that encourages users to start shopping or exploring products.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible
Scroll to the top of the page
Verify element "Primary call-to-action button" is visible

title: Featured products section is visible and populated on successful load
description: Verifies the featured products section appears on the landing page and shows product content.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Verify element "Featured products list" is visible
Verify element "A product card" is visible

title: Featured Valorant accounts section is visible on successful load
description: Verifies the landing page displays the featured Valorant accounts area for browsing accounts.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Verify element "An account card" is visible

title: Reviews section is visible and readable
description: Verifies customer reviews/testimonials are displayed on the landing page for social proof.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Verify element "A review card" is visible
Verify element "Reviewer name or handle" is visible

title: FAQ section expands an answer and collapses back
description: Verifies the FAQ accordion interaction works so users can reveal and hide answers.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Click on the first FAQ question
Verify element "FAQ answer content" is visible
Click on the same FAQ question again
Verify element "FAQ answer content" is not visible

title: How-it-works section is visible with step content
description: Verifies the landing page explains the purchase/delivery process with a visible steps section.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Scroll to the "How it works" section

title: Footer is visible and contains key navigation/help text
description: Verifies the landing page footer renders and provides common informational/navigation content.

steps.description: Navigate to the application's home page (/)
Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: View product catalog list and verify key catalog content is visible
description: Verifies the product catalog page renders a visible list of products for browsing.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog page using a route that is explicitly listed in the application's routes.
Verify at least one product card/list item element is visible.
Verify at least one visible product shows a price or plan-related text (for example "R$" or "Plano").

title: Open a product from the catalog and verify product details page shows plan selection
description: Verifies selecting a product navigates to its details view and displays its plans/pricing.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog page using a route that is explicitly listed in the application's routes.
Verify at least one product card/list item element is visible.
Click on the first visible product card/list item.
Verify the product details view is visible (for example a product title heading is visible).
Verify a plan selection section is visible (for example text "Planos" or "Escolher plano" is visible).
Verify at least one plan option shows a visible price (for example contains "R$").

title: Switch between plan options and verify the displayed price updates
description: Verifies that changing the selected plan updates the visible pricing information in the product details UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the product catalog page using a route that is explicitly listed in the application's routes.
Verify at least one product card/list item element is visible.
Click on the first visible product card/list item.
Verify at least two plan options are visible in the plan selection section.
Click on a different plan option than the default selected one.
Verify the currently displayed price text changes after selecting the new plan.

title: Dashboard Overview tab loads and shows recent activity sections
description: Verifies the User Dashboard Overview tab renders core sections for recent purchases and payments for an authenticated user.

title: Switch to Purchases tab and verify purchase history list is visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Purchases tab and see the purchase history area.

title: Switch to Security tab and verify security settings content is visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Security tab and see security-related settings.

title: Switch to Settings tab and verify account settings content is visible
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the Settings tab and see account/profile settings areas.

title: Overview shows empty-state messaging when there are no recent purchases/payments
description: Verifies the dashboard handles a no-data state by showing a clear empty-state message in recent purchases and payments sections.

title: Open My Orders page and view a non-closed order ticket details
description: Verifies a signed-in user can access the orders list and open a ticket to view its messages.

steps.description: Click on the first visible order/ticket in the list

title: Filter orders by status from the My Orders page
description: Verifies the user can change the status filter and see the list update accordingly.

title: Open an order ticket chat and send a text message
description: Verifies a user can send a text message in an existing ticket chat and see it appear in the conversation.

steps.description: Click on the first visible order/ticket in the list
Type "Teste de mensagem no chat do pedido" into the message input field

title: Skip Reviews: No static routes available to navigate
description: Ensures tests are not generated when there are no concrete routes defined for navigation.
